## Problem to solve

A clear description of the problem. Ex. "I run into a difficulty when [...]"

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you would like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional context

Any other useful information or screenshots.
